_comment: BSVA base settings template. Merge relevant keys into your ~/.claude/settings.json. Do not blindly overwrite your existing settings — the installer writes this file to ~/.claude/settings.bsva-template.json for you to review.

hooks._comment: The SessionStart hook opens the BSVA tour + marketplace ONCE on first Claude launch, then never again (gated by a flag file). Remove this block if you want to opt out. Other hook slots are empty — fill them per workflow needs.

_notes: Keep your personal deny list STRICTER than this template, not looser.
Never allow-list a command that writes outside the repo / your project folder.
Never commit your ~/.claude/settings.json to a shared repo — it is personal.
Secrets (API keys, tokens) belong in a secrets manager, not in settings.json.
